org.apache.paimon.table.source.snapshot

Interface StartingScanner.Result

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    StartingScanner.NextSnapshot, StartingScanner.NoSnapshot, StartingScanner.ScannedResult
    Enclosing interface:
    StartingScanner

    public static interface StartingScanner.Result
    Scan result of StartingScanner.scan(org.apache.paimon.table.source.snapshot.SnapshotReader).
